jsonLd.title: 1mg is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
1mg invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About 1mg:
1mg is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg!
